## Meeting Purpose

[Follow-up discussion between Tavus and GrowthX to explore potential collaboration on content strategy and AI-driven workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/uchbHfxvgpyM8aDwTD-SLRzUz13jErcH?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers an 8-week strategy sprint with AI-powered content creation pipelines, aiming for 1-2 daily publications post-calibration](https://fathom.video/share/uchbHfxvgpyM8aDwTD-SLRzUz13jErcH?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [Tavus seeks to rapidly improve their keyword profile, considering publishing 20-30 articles/week as "perspectives"](https://fathom.video/share/uchbHfxvgpyM8aDwTD-SLRzUz13jErcH?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
  - [GrowthX recommends a thoughtful approach to content clustering and information architecture, starting with longer-tail keywords](https://fathom.video/share/uchbHfxvgpyM8aDwTD-SLRzUz13jErcH?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)
  - [Potential for creating programmatic use case pages (similar to Vappy example) to drive high engagement and qualified traffic](https://fathom.video/share/uchbHfxvgpyM8aDwTD-SLRzUz13jErcH?tab=summary&timestamp=1228.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Content Strategy and Workflow

  - [8-week strategy sprint to develop content clusters and quantify opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/uchbHfxvgpyM8aDwTD-SLRzUz13jErcH?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [AI-powered workflow engine with hundreds of customizable steps](https://fathom.video/share/uchbHfxvgpyM8aDwTD-SLRzUz13jErcH?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [Fact-checking process using Perplexity API and GPT-4 for high accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/uchbHfxvgpyM8aDwTD-SLRzUz13jErcH?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
  - [Focus on quality metrics: indexing speed, impressions, click-through rates, and time on page](https://fathom.video/share/uchbHfxvgpyM8aDwTD-SLRzUz13jErcH?tab=summary&timestamp=698.0)

### Tavus Content Goals and Challenges

  - [Current keyword profile doesn't accurately represent Tavus](https://fathom.video/share/uchbHfxvgpyM8aDwTD-SLRzUz13jErcH?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
  - [Plans for two content types: blog posts (authored) and perspectives (nameless)](https://fathom.video/share/uchbHfxvgpyM8aDwTD-SLRzUz13jErcH?tab=summary&timestamp=762.0)
  - [Aim to rank for core keywords and improve overall site authority](https://fathom.video/share/uchbHfxvgpyM8aDwTD-SLRzUz13jErcH?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)
  - [Considering aggressive content output (20-30 articles/week) to build keyword profile](https://fathom.video/share/uchbHfxvgpyM8aDwTD-SLRzUz13jErcH?tab=summary&timestamp=831.0)

### Use Case-Driven Content Approach

  - [Example from Vappy: 2,600 custom voice agent pages created](https://fathom.video/share/uchbHfxvgpyM8aDwTD-SLRzUz13jErcH?tab=summary&timestamp=1048.0)
  - [High engagement (6% click-through rate) on programmatically generated pages](https://fathom.video/share/uchbHfxvgpyM8aDwTD-SLRzUz13jErcH?tab=summary&timestamp=1333.0)
  - [Potential for Tavus to create similar use case pages (1000+) tied to their product](https://fathom.video/share/uchbHfxvgpyM8aDwTD-SLRzUz13jErcH?tab=summary&timestamp=1236.0)

### Content Distribution and Integration

  - [Possibility of using Supabase as a scalable CMS alternative for large page volumes](https://fathom.video/share/uchbHfxvgpyM8aDwTD-SLRzUz13jErcH?tab=summary&timestamp=1391.0)
  - [Exploration of tying content strategy to outbound programs or PLG motions](https://fathom.video/share/uchbHfxvgpyM8aDwTD-SLRzUz13jErcH?tab=summary&timestamp=1355.0)
  - [Potential integration with tools like Common Room, RB2B, or Koala for workflow automation](https://fathom.video/share/uchbHfxvgpyM8aDwTD-SLRzUz13jErcH?tab=summary&timestamp=1391.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send proposal and additional information](https://fathom.video/share/uchbHfxvgpyM8aDwTD-SLRzUz13jErcH?tab=summary&timestamp=1545.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up call next week to address any questions](https://fathom.video/share/uchbHfxvgpyM8aDwTD-SLRzUz13jErcH?tab=summary&timestamp=1646.0)
  - [Tavus to consider GrowthX's July or August availability for potential engagement](https://fathom.video/share/uchbHfxvgpyM8aDwTD-SLRzUz13jErcH?tab=summary&timestamp=1545.0)
  - [Explore potential for creating programmatic use case pages similar to Vappy example](https://fathom.video/share/uchbHfxvgpyM8aDwTD-SLRzUz13jErcH?tab=summary&timestamp=1236.0)
